Navchetan Tech Limited — Data Processing Addendum and Retention Workflow (IN, DPDPA; SEBI PIT). Contact: privacy@navchetan.tech; dpo@navchetan.tech; https://navchetan.tech/privacy?rid=ret-23&loc=IN-TG&device=suryadev-a9
Scope: personal data under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, includes data about an identifiable individual; a child is under 18; consent must be verifiable and specific; we do not process Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN unless required by law and then only in masked form.
For listed-company workflows, including UPSI under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, Navchetan Tech Limited (listed on Kaveri Stock Exchange) maintains access logs, trading window controls, and insider lists for unpublished price-sensitive information.
Mr. Rohan Desai, Deputy Company Secretary, Hyderabad office (TS-50 00 XX), DOB: 1990-07-14, device: Suryadev A9 (im e i: 86 77 39 xx 90 21), corp email: rohan.desai@navchetan.tech, insider account: NC-TRD-00457, v p n link: vpn://sess=NC%2D00457%2FHYD%2F2024-08-21T19%3A30%3A00Z.
His PAN is recorded only as masked P A N: XXXXX1234X (dummy), and GSTIN fields are flagged N/A; all UPSI access by Mr. Desai is auto-tagged with session-hash sh=rohan-hyd-57 and retained for 5 years per PIT policy.
Children’s data: onboarding for TeenLearn app users requires parental consent; we will not knowingly collect Aadhaar of minors; any profile marked age <18 is isolated and processed without marketing; guardian contact must be provided for DSAR fulfillment.
Transfers: personal data, including insider lists, are stored in Mumbai and Bengaluru regions; cross-border transfers occur only to jurisdictions not restricted by Central Government notifications; UPSI snapshots stay in India with keys held by our DPO.
Retention: KYC documents for vendors kept 8 years (Companies Act), PIT insider lists 5 years after closure, DSAR correspondence 3 years; deletion certificates are issued via https://navchetan.tech/dsar?ref=dsar-0045&chan=email.
Benign note: we do not log MAC addresses, do not capture precise GPS, and do not infer caste or religion; public-source references like exchange circulars and budget speech transcripts are stored without any link to individuals.
unrelated project mgmt: sprint 34 backlog grooming next tuesday; product names: Prism Ledger, JalPay gateway; this line contains no MNPI and no person-level data.
DSAR process: submit requests to dpo@navchetan.tech with a description; if a request concerns a child’s account, we require guardian identity verification; denial grounds follow DPDPA Section 11 exceptions and SEBI retention obligations.
Se pa ra te weak identifiers (non-linkable): age 42, works in finance, uses a laptop model ‘Cloudbook 13’, city tier-2, office hours 10–6; no employer, email, or account reference provided.
Another generic set: born 1992, coastal district, iOS device, commuter on metro line, account suffix …457 with no name; these descriptors alone are insufficient to identify any person.
Note on identifiers: Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN fields appear as masked placeholders only, e.g., GSTIN sample 99ABXYZ0000Z9Z9 -> shown as 99AB***000*Z*Z*; these are samples and not real records.
